description_long: This is a male adult figure depicted standing upright with a relaxed posture. He is dressed in a button-up long-sleeve shirt and fitted pants, both of which appear to be casual yet neat. The figure is barefoot, with toes and feet clearly visible, and his hands are relaxed at his sides. His hair is short and styled with some volume, giving a tidy and well-groomed appearance. The facial features are defined, with a neutral expression and forward gaze. The overall build is average, and the clothing fits closely to the body, suggesting a modern urban pedestrian.
description: A barefoot adult male standing upright, wearing a button-up shirt and fitted pants, with short styled hair and a relaxed posture.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, button-up shirt, relaxed arms, and bare feet.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the shirt's fit, and the bare left foot.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shirt, pants, and both feet from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, shirt, and the bare right foot.
attribute_clothing_type: casual button-up long-sleeve shirt and fitted pants
